overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character exploring a futuristic city at night. The character walks through outdoor plazas, enters a modern building, and continues through a covered walkway near a landed spaceship.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor plaza with ancient tree and modern building entrance

futuristic building with curved roof and horizontal light strips
wide stone staircase leading up to the plaza level

segments.scene_description: The character walks across an outdoor plaza at night toward a modern building entrance. An ancient illuminated tree with hanging vines stands prominently to the left while the path leads up stone steps toward the building's glowing entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: modern lobby with blue walls and reception seating

events.description: character enters the building through a large archway with wooden frames

agents.ego_description: walking through the lobby from the entrance toward the rear exit

notable_agents.action: sitting on a curved bench against the wall

dark blue wall surfaces with wooden trim and wave patterns

segments.scene_description: The character enters a modern lobby with blue wall panels and wooden accents, passing benches and indoor plants. The space is illuminated by overhead fixtures as the character walks through toward the rear exit archway.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial district plaza with landed spaceship and MAST building

events.description: exits building into open plaza revealing MAST building and landed spaceship

agents.ego_description: walking around the plaza observing the landed spaceship and approaching the MAST building

large spacecraft with glowing orange thrusters parked in the plaza center
flaming debris or fire pit emitting bright orange light

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the building, the character enters a large plaza featuring the massive MAST building and a landed spaceship with burning thrusters. The character walks around the fire pit as other pedestrians move through the futuristic commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront walkway with glass railings and hanging banners

events.description: enters covered walkway with curved roof structure alongside water feature

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered pathway beside the illuminated water feature

entered.detail: curved metallic roof structure with integrated lighting
transparent safety barrier overlooking the water
calm water body with green illuminated bottom visible through glass
vertical colorful flags suspended from overhead structure

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered walkway with a curved roof and glass railings overlooking an illuminated water feature. Colorful vertical banners hang overhead as the path continues toward distant city structures, with the MAST building now visible in the background to the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet outdoor plaza through a modern interior and back out into a bustling futuristic commercial district. It begins by following a character past an ancient illuminated tree with hanging vines, ascending stone steps toward the glowing entrance of a building. As the character steps inside, the environment shifts to a sleek lobby characterized by blue wall panels, wooden accents, and overhead lighting before moving toward a rear exit archway. The scene then opens into a massive plaza where the character walks past a landed spaceship with burning thrusters and the towering MAST building amidst a crowd of pedestrians. Finally, the camera glides into a covered walkway with a curved roof and glass railings, passing colorful vertical banners and an illuminated water feature as the city structures stretch into the distance.
